title: RigVision-3D Redis Data Contracts
description: Exact JSON formats for all Redis keys. All modules MUST conform to these schemas. Changes require team review.

tracked_person.description: A single tracked person with 3D position and PPE status

x.description: X position in meters (along room length)

z.description: Z position in meters (along room width)

zone.description: Which zone the person is in

cameras_visible.description: Number of cameras that can see this person

camera_ids.description: IDs of cameras currently seeing this person

zone_state.description: Current state of a single zone including sensor readings

label.description: Human-readable zone name from zone_definitions.json (e.g. 'Room A - Floor 1')

floor.description: Floor index this zone is on

sensor_types.description: Sensor types physically present in this zone. UI only renders these.

temperature.description: Temperature in °C (null = no fresh sensor of this type)

vibration.description: Vibration in g RMS (null = no fresh sensor)

noise.description: Noise level in dB (null = no fresh sensor)

gas_h2s.description: H₂S concentration in ppm (null = no fresh sensor)

pressure.description: Pressure in bar (null = no fresh sensor)

person_count.description: Number of persons currently in zone

ppe_violations.description: List of PPE violation descriptions for persons in this zone

sensor_reading.description: A single sensor's latest reading. Keyed by sensor_id (matching cad/zone_definitions.json).

value.description: Latest measured value in the sensor's native unit. null = no data yet.

updated_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when this value was written

diagnostic.description: An LLM diagnostic report for one zone, produced on-demand. Self-describing (carries its source alert's identity).

triggered_sensors.description: Sensor types that breached a threshold

telemetry_snapshot.description: Sensor type → value at trigger time

timestamp.description: Unix ms when the diagnostic was produced

rigvision:persons.description: Written by CV pipeline at ~10Hz. Array of all currently tracked persons.

rigvision:zones.description: Written by sensor engine at ~1Hz. Object with zone IDs as keys.

rigvision:diagnostics.description: On-demand LLM diagnostics. Written by anomaly_listener (via Kafka → backend). Newest first, capped at 50.

rigvision:sensors:latest.description: THE SENSOR SEAM. Written by any sensor adapter (manual dashboard now, MQTT bridge later). Read by the CV pipeline to build zone states. Object keyed by sensor_id from cad/zone_definitions.json.
